description_long: This is a large, clear plastic bottle filled with a golden-brown liquid, likely tea, as suggested by the green label with Japanese text and branding. The bottle has a ribbed lower section for grip and a smooth upper section, with a wide cylindrical body tapering slightly towards the neck. The cap is beige and ribbed, indicating a screw cap design, and the label wraps around the upper half of the bottle, featuring white and yellow text, a barcode, and recycling symbols. The label is predominantly green with some white and yellow accents, and includes images and branding elements. The bottle appears to be a 2-liter size, as indicated by the markings on the label, and is made of transparent PET plastic, allowing the contents to be clearly visible.
description: A large, clear plastic bottle with a green Japanese label, filled with golden-brown liquid and sealed with a beige screw cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main green label with Japanese text, branding, and a white image panel.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the barcode, recycling symbols, and product information on the green label.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting additional Japanese text and product details on the label.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with prominent yellow Japanese characters and the 2L marking on the green label.
attribute_label_or_branding: Green label with white and yellow Japanese text, branding, a barcode, recycling symbols, and a small image panel; label wraps around the upper half of the bottle.
